'''Gabo Tychee''' was a male [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] criminal who was employed by [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] and the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crime syndicate during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. After committing a terrible crime against the Hutts, his bounty was 4,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 2,000 dead. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was later found and captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] on [[Outland Transit Station]]. Prior to this, Tychee had been known to drift from spaceport to spaceport along [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] trade routes, until finally obtaining work as a hired gun for the gang of [[Meeko Ghintee]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
